install.migrationsAlreadyPublished: {count} ملف ترحيل من Escalated منشور بالفعل؛ تم التخطي. أعد التشغيل مع --force لاستبدالها.
install.npmManual: تعذّر تثبيت حزمة npm تلقائيًا. قم بتشغيل الأمر يدويًا:
install.userModelNotFound: تعذّر العثور على نموذج المستخدم. ستحتاج إلى ضبطه يدويًا.
install.userModelAlreadyConfigured: نموذج المستخدم ينفّذ بالفعل واجهة Ticketable.
install.userModelConfirm: هل تريد ضبط نموذج المستخدم تلقائيًا لتنفيذ واجهة Ticketable؟
install.stepTicketable: نفّذ واجهة Ticketable على نموذج المستخدم الخاص بك:
install.stepGates: حدّد بوابات التفويض في AuthServiceProvider الخاص بك:
install.stepTailwind: أضف صفحات Escalated إلى إعدادات محتوى Tailwind الخاصة بك:
install.stepInertia: أضف محلل صفحات Inertia والإضافة في ملف app.ts الخاص بك:
install.copyMigrations: تم نسخ عمليات الترحيل. قم بتشغيل `rails db{migrate}` لتطبيقها.
install.injectManual: أضف هذه الطرق إلى نموذج المستخدم يدويًا:
install.step3: 3. أضف طرق escalated_agent? و escalated_admin? إلى نموذج المستخدم
install.step4: 4. ثبّت مكونات Vue: انسخ من vendor/escalated/resources/js/
install.step5: 5. قم بإعداد محلل صفحات Inertia ليشمل صفحات Escalated
install.runMigrationsConfirm: هل تريد تشغيل الترحيلات وزرع الأذونات الافتراضية الآن؟

conversation.noteVisibleToAgents: This note is only visible to agents
conversation.replyVisibleToCustomer: This reply will be visible to the customer

managePlugins.activateDescription: Are you sure you want to activate "{name}"? This will load the plugin and register its hooks.
managePlugins.deactivateDescription: Are you sure you want to deactivate "{name}"? Its hooks and extensions will be unregistered.
managePlugins.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{name}"? This will remove all plugin files and cannot be undone.
managePlugins.emptyDescription: Upload a plugin ZIP file or install one via Composer to get started.
managePlugins.title: Plugins
managePlugins.uploadHelperText: Upload a plugin ZIP archive containing a valid plugin.json manifest.
managePlugins.uploadSuccessBody: The plugin has been extracted and is ready to activate.

settings.allowCustomerCloseHelper: Allow customers to close their own tickets.
settings.allowGuestTicketsHelper: Allow unauthenticated users to submit tickets.
settings.attachmentsDescription: Configure attachment limits for tickets and replies.
settings.autoCloseDaysHelper: Number of days after resolution before a ticket is automatically closed.
settings.autoCloseDescription: Automatically close resolved tickets after a specified period.
settings.maxAttachmentSizeHelper: Maximum file size in kilobytes (1024 KB = 1 MB).
settings.showPoweredByHelper: Display attribution badge in the support portal footer.
settings.ticketReferencePrefixHelper: Prefix for ticket reference numbers (e.g., ESC-00001).
settings.title: Support Settings

cannedResponse.sharedHelper: Shared responses are visible to all agents.

escalationRule.actionsDescription: Define the actions to execute when conditions are met.
escalationRule.conditionsDescription: Define the conditions that must be met for this rule to trigger.

macro.actionsDescription: Define the actions this macro will perform when applied to a ticket.
macro.sharedHelper: Shared macros are visible to all agents.

replies.internalNoteHelper: Internal notes are only visible to agents.
replies.title: Replies & Notes

slaPolicy.businessHoursHelper: Count only business hours toward SLA deadlines.
slaPolicy.defaultPolicyHelper: The default policy is applied to new tickets automatically.
slaPolicy.firstResponseDescription: Maximum hours for the first agent response, by priority level.
slaPolicy.resolutionDescription: Maximum hours for full ticket resolution, by priority level.

slaBreach.emptyDescription: All tickets are within SLA targets.
slaBreach.heading: SLA Breach Alerts
